roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT
/CAL: APD MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT TO COUNTY OF RESIDENCE (TO ALAMEDA COUNTY)/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THE DEFENSE OBJECTS TO THE CIRCUMSTANCES IN AGGRAVATION ASFOLLOWS:/X:THE FIRST CIRCUMSTANCE & THE 3RD (IN THAT THE LOSS OF $205 ISNOT OF 'GREAT MONITARY VALUE')/AJW/CH4:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 90D/CTS: 48/WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/X:DEFENDANT IS PPRF COMPLIANT/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA//COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/SA1:MABEL YEUNG & MICHELLE YEUNG/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AS TO VICTIM MABEL CHEUNG/X:AS TO VICTIM MICHELLE CHEUNG, THE DEFENDANT HAS AGREED TO PAY VICTIMRESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $205/CTORD:THE SENTENCE IN COUNT 7 SHALL BE IDENTICAL TO THAT OF COUNT 6 & RUN CONCURRENTLY EXCEPT AS TO THE MATTER OF THE FINES & FEES/CTORD THE FOLLOWING FINES & FEES ARE IMPOSED AS TO COUNT6/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/DISM3/CTORD PERSUANT TO DUENAS, ALL FINES & FEES ARE PERMANATLY STAYED EXCEPT THE PROBATION REVOCATION FINE & THE VICTIM RESTITUTION/CONTD:FILING OF CR-110 & CR-111/DOPU:ATTORNEY CAN ACCEPTTHE CR-110/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 006, 245(A)4PC, A FELONY AND ADD COUNT 007, 484(A) A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   006, 007/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 02-18-20/PPRFCUST/TWS/REMA/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 01-24-20/987,2/NB/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION TODETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED AND SIGNED/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 01-10-20/DOP//CONTD: FOR STATUS OF CDC HOLD ON 01-10-20/DOP/
/CAL:FILING OF CR 110 & 111/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: ORDER OF RESTITUTION WAS ENTERED ON 02-18-20/
/CAL: STATUS OF CDC HOLD/X: BAIL REMAINS AS SET/X: DATE OF 01-16-20 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/CTAPPTS:ERIN CRANE/DEF:IS 4011,5/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
